title: apiv2 container commit for libpod
body:
add an endpoint for a libpod specific commit.  add the abilility to define the format.  also update documentation accordingly.

Fixes: #5586

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude,giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Doesn't Docker allow a full image config be passed in the body? That seems useful, to avoid the expensive and uncertain parsing of Change

> Doesn't Docker allow a full image config be passed in the body? That seems useful, to avoid the expensive and uncertain parsing of Change

We dont have the capability to do that ...
